imageAlt: Prompt  Smart Capture users to subscribe roadmap item preview image
title: Prompt  Smart Capture users to subscribe
summaryBody: Currently Mobile users hit a wall when they use their 10th free Smart Capture. Sending them a link (via a webapp ping) would give them a way to subscribe on web or mobile web.
detailBody: Currently Mobile users hit a wall when they use their 10th free Smart Capture. Sending them a link (via a webapp ping) would give them a way to subscribe on web or mobile web.
